questions.label: Strategic AI Vision
questions.prompt: Our organization has a clear and compelling AI vision and roadmap in place.

questions.label: AI Enterprise Metrics
questions.prompt: How mature are the KPIs used to track AI investment value and business ROI?

questions.label: Data Quality Ownership
questions.prompt: We have clearly assigned data quality ownership and a formal data dictionary.
questions.typed_response: We have a Chief Data Officer (CDO) since Q3 2025. Snowflake data catalog in place for 60% of production datasets. Monthly data quality review cadence.

questions.label: Data Dictionary and Ownership
questions.prompt: We have clear data dictionaries and assigned domain ownership.
questions.typed_response: Partial coverage. Finance and HR domains are fully documented with data stewards. Engineering datasets still ad hoc.

questions.label: AI Policies and Review
questions.prompt: Formal AI usage and governance policies exist and are reviewed regularly.
questions.typed_response: AI Policy v3.0 approved by Risk Committee in Q4 2025. Quarterly compliance review chaired by CISO. Policy violations tracked in ServiceNow.

justifications.text: CEO-sponsored AI Steering Committee meets every 6 weeks. $12M budget approved for FY2026. CTO owns the AI roadmap with quarterly board reporting.
CDO appointed September 2025. Data quality KPI: 95% completeness target. Current state: 87% completeness across Snowflake production tables.
